backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that fetches metal prices from the IBJA rates URL every 10 seconds using HTTP outcalls and a recurring timer, with a query transform function for response processing.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features—updating hardcoded fallback gold and silver prices in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts—to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing UI changes, hook behavior, and styling fixes across the application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full page layout by rendering BrandTicker, MetalTicker, FloatingCallButton, and all main page sections in order.
frontend/src/components/BrandTicker.tsx: Simple header component that displays the 'GURURAJ BULLION' brand name in large, bold, centered text on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section card that displays a WhatsApp phone number and a button linking to the business's WhatsApp chat, with a background image overlay.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCallButt: Draggable floating phone button component that persists its position in sessionStorage, supports mouse and touch drag, and links to a tel: URI while suppressing navigation on drag.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright year, a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link styled in yellow, and a heart icon, on a dark neutral background.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with a furnace background image, dark gradient overlay, and animated white text content including a pulsing Sparkles icon and tagline copy.
frontend/src/components/LiveRatesDashboa: React component that displays live IBJA gold and silver metal rates in a dashboard layout, with market open/closed status, a refresh button, and loading skeleton states.
frontend/src/components/MetalTicker.tsx: React ticker component that shows live IBJA gold and silver prices with trend indicators (up/down/neutral) and market open/closed status, updating dynamically via the metal prices query.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Memoized card component that displays a precious metal product with its image, purity levels, and available formats, styled for gold or silver variants.
Section component that renders a grid of ProductCards for silver and gold products alongside refinery process images with overlay captions.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaAsset: Component that previews and provides a download button for a 1080×1080 Instagram sponsorship image promoting live gold and silver rates.
frontend/src/config/api.ts: Exports API configuration constants for the IBJA metal prices endpoint, fetch interval (10s), and request timeout (8s).
frontend/src/config/fallback.ts: Exports hardcoded fallback INR prices for gold (₹170,000/10g) and silver (₹309,000/kg) used when live IBJA rates are unavailable.
frontend/src/config/refresh.ts: Exports React Query refresh configuration constants including a 10-second refetch interval and 9-second stale time for live IBJA rate polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook that fetches live gold and silver prices from the IBJA API, computes GST breakdowns, market open/closed status, and falls back to hardcoded prices on failure.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet using Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based design tokens for light/dark modes, including custom metallic (gold/silver) color variables and utility transition classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/ibja.ts: TypeScript interfaces defining the shape of IBJA rates data, individual metal price objects, and the combined metal prices dataset.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, custom shadows, border radii, font family, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the IBJA Gold & Silver Price Tracker, its architectural notes, existing features (updated fallback prices), and versioning info.
